sentences.target: On regarde un film avec un prince.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʁəɡaʁd œ̃ film avɛk œ̃ pʁɛ̃s/

translations.fr: On regarde un film avec un prince.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʁəɡaʁd œ̃ film avɛk œ̃ pʁɛ̃s/
translations.en: We’re watching a movie with a prince.
translations.es: Estamos viendo una película con un príncipe.
translations.de: Wir schauen einen Film mit einem Prinzen.
translations.it: Stiamo guardando un film con un principe.
translations.ko: 우리는 왕자가 나오는 영화를 보고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在看一部有王子的电影。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度睇一套有王子嘅電影。
translations.pt: Estamos assistindo a um filme com um príncipe.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang xem một bộ phim có hoàng tử.
translations.nl: We kijken een film met een prins.
translations.hi: हम एक राजकुमार वाली फ़िल्म देख रहे हैं.
translations.el: Βλέπουμε μια ταινία με έναν πρίγκιπα.
translations.nb: Vi ser en film med en prins.
translations.id: Kami sedang menonton film dengan seorang pangeran.
translations.sv: Vi tittar på en film med en prins.
translations.ro: Ne uităm la un film cu un prinț.
translations.cs: Díváme se na film s princem.
translations.da: Vi ser en film med en prins.
translations.ja: 王子が出てくる映画を見ています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal personal pronoun often used to mean 'we' in spoken French; 3rd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular, agreeing with 'On'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'film'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'regarde'.
Preposition introducing a comitative complement.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing 'prince'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Tu te déguises en prince ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty tə deɡiz ɑ̃ pʁɛ̃s sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu te déguises en prince ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty tə deɡiz ɑ̃ pʁɛ̃s sə swaʁ/
translations.en: You’re dressing up as a prince tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche te disfrazas de príncipe.
translations.de: Du verkleidest dich heute Abend als Prinz.
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером ты переоденешься в принца.
translations.pt: Você vai se fantasiar de príncipe hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn sẽ hóa trang thành hoàng tử.
translations.nl: Vanavond ga je verkleed als prins.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері ти переодягнешся у принца.
translations.hi: तुम आज रात राजकुमार के रूप में तैयार हो रहे हो.
translations.pl: Dziś wieczorem przebierasz się za księcia.
translations.nb: I kveld kler du deg ut som en prins.
translations.id: Malam ini kamu akan menyamar sebagai pangeran.
translations.sv: I kväll klär du ut dig till prins.
translations.cs: Dnes večer se převlékáš za prince.
translations.da: I aften klæder du dig ud som prins.
translations.ja: 今夜は王子に仮装する。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'déguises'.
Reflexive clitic pronoun (2nd person singular) marking the pronominal use of the verb.
Main verb (pronominal: se déguiser) in present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Preposition introducing a role/predicative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'en' expressing the assumed role.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'soir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement with 'ce'.

sentences.target: Ma fille aime le prince de ce conte.
sentences.reading: /ma fij ɛm lə pʁɛ̃s də sə kɔ̃t/

translations.fr: Ma fille aime le prince de ce conte.
translations.ipa: /ma fij ɛm lə pʁɛ̃s də sə kɔ̃t/
translations.en: My daughter likes the prince in this tale.
translations.es: A mi hija le gusta el príncipe de este cuento.
translations.de: Meine Tochter mag den Prinzen in diesem Märchen.
translations.it: A mia figlia piace il principe di questa fiaba.
translations.ko: 내 딸은 이 이야기의 왕자를 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我女儿喜欢这个故事里的王子。
translations.yue: 我個女鍾意呢個故事入面嘅王子。
translations.ru: Моей дочери нравится принц из этой сказки.
translations.pt: Minha filha gosta do príncipe deste conto.
translations.he: הבת שלי אוהבת את הנסיך שבאגדה הזאת.
translations.vi: Con gái tôi thích hoàng tử trong câu chuyện này.
translations.ar: ابنتी تحب الأمير في هذه الحكاية.
translations.nl: Mijn dochter houdt van de prins in dit verhaal.
translations.uk: Моїй доньці подобається принц із цієї казки.
translations.hu: A lányom szereti ennek a mesének a hercegét.
translations.hi: मेरी बेटी को इस कहानी का राजकुमार पसंद है.
translations.pl: Mojej córce podoba się książę z tej baśni.
translations.el: Η κόρη μου αγαπά τον πρίγκιπα αυτού του παραμυθιού.
translations.nb: Datteren min liker prinsen i dette eventyret.
translations.id: Putri saya menyukai pangeran dalam dongeng ini.
translations.sv: Min dotter gillar prinsen i den här sagan.
translations.ro: Fiicei mele îi place prințul din această poveste.
translations.cs: Moje dcera má ráda prince z této pohádky.
translations.da: Min datter kan godt lide prinsen i dette eventyr.
translations.ja: 娘はこの物語の王子が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; feminine singular form agreeing with 'fille'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of 'aime'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing 'prince'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'aime'.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'conte'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Il joue au chevalier et au prince.
sentences.reading: /il ʒu o ʃəvalje e o pʁɛ̃s/

translations.fr: Il joue au chevalier et au prince.
translations.ipa: /il ʒu o ʃəvalje e o pʁɛ̃s/
translations.es: Está jugando a caballero y a príncipe.
translations.it: Sta giocando al cavaliere e al principe.
translations.ko: 그는 기사와 왕자 놀이를 하고 있어요.
translations.ru: Он играет в рыцаря и принца.
translations.pt: Ele está brincando de cavaleiro e de príncipe.
translations.vi: Cậu ấy đang chơi trò đóng vai hiệp sĩ và hoàng tử.
translations.uk: Він грає в лицаря та принца.
translations.hi: वह शूरवीर और राजकुमार बनकर खेल रहा है.
translations.pl: On bawi się w rycerza i księcia.
translations.el: Παίζει τον ιππότη και τον πρίγκιπα.
translations.id: Dia sedang bermain peran sebagai ksatria dan pangeran.
translations.ro: El se joacă de-a cavalerul și de-a prințul.
translations.cs: Hraje si na rytíře a prince.
translations.ja: 彼は騎士と王子のごっこをしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of 'joue'.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; used with 'à' for games/roles.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le' (preposition + definite article) introducing the complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'au', denoting the role being played.
Coordinating conjunction linking two coordinated complements.
Contraction of 'à' + 'le' (preposition + definite article) introducing the second complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'au', coordinated with 'chevalier'.
